chart-library.description: Historical chart pattern search engine. Search 24M+ pre-computed embeddings across 15K+ symbols and 10 years of data. 19 tools for pattern matching, forward returns, regime analysis, anomaly detection, and trading signals. Free tier: 200 calls/day, no signup. Install: pip install chartlibrary-mcp

fetch.description: Fetch financial news, SEC filings, and market data from web sources.

memory.description: Track trade ideas, watchlists, and analysis findings across sessions.
